p2p_enrich.notes:
Added 4 pass_to_pass CI/CD gates:
1. test_repo_cargo_check_chroma_error - cargo check -p chroma-error
2. test_repo_cargo_clippy_chroma_error - cargo clippy -p chroma-error -- -D warnings
3. test_repo_cargo_fmt_check - cargo fmt -- --check (from chroma root)
4. test_repo_cargo_test_chroma_error - cargo test -p chroma-error

Note: chroma-log and chroma-storage packages require protoc which is not installed in the Docker image.
The base commit chroma-error package has 0 tests but the test infrastructure passes.
All 4 p2p tests verified to pass on base commit.
